PyTorch和MindSpore均成功执行且结果一致 for float32 real tensor, but the documented behavior emphasizes complex number conjugation; to improve coverage and verify robustness on edge cases (e.g., complex dtypes, scalar, empty tensor, high-dimensional, boundary dtypes), we mutate the test case to include a complex64 input — which is the primary intended use case per both docs — and extend shape to 2D to validate broadcasting/contiguity handling. This also tests dtype consistency: PyTorch.conj on non-complex returns identity, MindSpore.conj on real also returns identity, but explicit complex input validates core conjugation logic.
两框架执行均成功且结果一致，但原始用例仅使用float32实数输入，未覆盖复数类型这一核心功能场景；根据PyTorch和MindSpore文档，conj的核心语义是处理复数（取共轭），对实数仅作直通返回，因此需变异为复数输入以验证关键功能路径；同时应增加边界形状（如0维标量、含0的shape）和不同复数精度（complex64/complex128）以提升测试强度。
